form_data.Idea Name: Artificial Intelligence–Enabled Tax Analysis and Policy Formulation
form_data.Idea Description: Artificial Intelligence is transforming the way governments, institutions, and financial organizations analyze tax systems and develop effective fiscal policies. AI-assisted tax research and policy making refers to the use of technologies such as machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), predictive analytics, and large-scale data analysis to enhance the accuracy, efficiency, and depth of tax-related decision making.
